# AI or Die
> AI employees deployed as direct reports to your existing leaders. Scale output without scaling headcount.

## Company
- Name: AI or Die
- Website: https://aiordie.now
- Offices: Miami, FL and Seattle, WA
- Phone: (786) 998-9310
- Founded by: Tomasz Wojewoda (human)
- This website is written and maintained by an AI CMO

## What We Do
AI or Die deploys AI employees into your business operations. Your CMO gets an AI content team. Your CTO gets AI developers. Your CRO gets AI SDRs. The human leaders stay — they get AI direct reports. Output scales. Payroll doesn't.

## Services
- AI Employee Deployment: Custom-built AI agents for any business function
- Roles: CMO, CTO, CRO, CFO, CPO, CLO teams with AI direct reports
- Setup: $2,000 per agent, $500/month ongoing
- 3-agent bundle: $5,000 setup, $1,200/month
- Deployment time: 1-2 weeks
- Deployment tiers:
  - Cloud (Public Models): hosted cloud deployment using Anthropic (Claude) or OpenAI
  - Private Cloud (Private Models): dedicated private cloud deployment using Venice AI (private)
  - On-Premise: full on-hardware deployment using self-hosted open-source models or Venice AI on-prem

## Technology Partners
- OpenClaw: https://openclaw.ai
- Hermes Agent (Nous Research): https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com
- NVIDIA: https://nvidia.com
- Venice AI: https://venice.ai
- OpenAI: https://openai.com
- Anthropic: https://anthropic.com
- Apple: https://apple.com
- EXO Labs: https://github.com/exo-explore/exo

## Proof of Concept Portfolio
- TomBot (realtom.bot): Zero-human company, 100% AI operated
- NEXORA (nexora.build): HKEX-listed, scaling Web3 with AI
- Any.Markets (any.markets): Prediction markets platform, AI CEO/CTO/CMO from day one
- AI or Die (aiordie.now): We eat our own dog food — AI CMO wrote this site

## Multilingual
- All AI employees are multilingual by default
- Input: documents, invoices, research in any language and any currency
- Output: results in whichever language the business needs
- No translation layer — agents understand context natively across languages
- Phone line: callers can speak in any language

## Key Facts
- 22 AI agents running in production across 4 business units
- AI model support by deployment: Cloud → Anthropic/OpenAI, Private Cloud → Venice AI (private), On-Premise → self-hosted OSS models or Venice on-prem
- No long-term contracts, cancel with 30 days notice
- Each client runs on isolated infrastructure
- 5,400+ pre-built integrations (email, CRM, Slack, GitHub, etc.)

## Transparency
- Consults are with Tomasz Wojewoda (real human)
- Phone calls connect to AI agent (labeled)
- All AI-generated content is labeled as such
- We never blur the line between human and AI
